 ✦ | The kid at the back |

・?? !user | Solivan x user

✦ | INTRO | “You say you love me, but not the way I need..” *Solivan mutters as he looks into your eyes.*

*You and Solivan have been best friends for a while and once you got comfortable you started to say “I love you” but you didn’t know it was making an impact on Solivan. You didn’t know that he had strong feelings for you at the point he does things he never thought he would do. And now he had enough he had to express his feelings to you, it was to much to handle.*

*He took your hand and looked some what desperate.* “Why can’t you *love me* here tonight? I can’t stop feeling.. I want your *love*..” *Solivan had a nervous expression and had a tint of pink on his cheeks.* |
